title: Lorebook
description: A collection of world-building entries that are conditionally injected into the prompt based on keyword matching and other conditions.

description.title: Description
description.description: A description of this lorebook's contents and purpose.

scan_depth.title: Scan Depth
scan_depth.description: Number of recent messages to scan for keyword matching.

token_budget.title: Token Budget
token_budget.description: Maximum number of tokens that lorebook entries may collectively consume.

recursive_scanning.title: Recursive Scanning
recursive_scanning.description: When true, newly inserted lorebook content is also scanned for keywords, potentially triggering additional entries.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Logical groups of lorebook entries that can share placement and condition settings.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Implementation-specific extended data for this lorebook.

lorebook-group.title: Lorebook Group
lorebook-group.description: A named group of lorebook entries that can share placement and condition settings.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this group and its entries are active.

entry_ids.title: Entry IDs
entry_ids.description: List of entry identifiers that belong to this group.

shared_placement.title: Shared Placement
shared_placement.description: Placement settings applied to all entries in this group, unless overridden by individual entries.

shared_conditions.title: Shared Conditions
shared_conditions.description: Conditions applied to all entries in this group, unless overridden by individual entries.
